pages.body:
SEND DIAGNOSTICS TO PERFECTLY SNUG

After contacting service@perfectlysnug.com, you can send diagnostic data by:

  • Turn on topper power (both sides for two zone toppers)
  • Confirm that topper is connected to WiFi
  • Push the 'Send Diagnostics' button below

NOTE: The topper will stop operating for up to a minute while sending data and will then restart normal operation. No personal information is transmitted, only technical information pertaining to topper functionality.

SEND DIAGNOSTICS
Transmission Status:
TOPPER FIRMWARE UPDATE

If Perfectly Snug emails you to update the firmware in your topper press the Update Firmware button.

Note: Please use the Apple App Store or Google Play Store for Phone/Tablet App updates.

UPDATE FIRMWARE
PRODUCT INFORMATION

Designed and Manufactured by:

Perfectly Snug Inc.
www.perfectlysnug.com

Product Information:

Twin (99-0100), TwinXL (99-0101), TwinXL_L (99-0106), Double (99-0102)
Power Supply Input: 120Vac (nom), 2.4Aac (max), 50/60Hz
Topper Supply Input: 24Vdc, 4Adc , 96W

Queen (99-0103), King (99-0104), Cal-King (99-0105)
Power Supply Input: 120Vac (nom), 4.8Aac (max), 50/60Hz
Topper Supply Inputs: 24Vdc, 4Adc, 96W, per power supply

Reconnecting To Bed...
